prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of REGN, the stock typically exhibits annualized volatility around 35-40%. For a 22-day period, this translates to approximately 7-8% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes modest upward drift typical of large-cap biotech stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the geometric Brownian motion model, with wider intervals reflecting increased uncertainty over the 22-day horizon.
